projects.name: MiniFT
projects.summary: A finance tracker built around a Rust backend, PostgreSQL data modeling, authentication, containerized deployment, and a TypeScript interface for managing transactions, budgets, and financial habits.

projects.name: AnimeSR
projects.summary: A recommendation-oriented catalog that pairs backend filtering and search logic with a TypeScript interface, helping users explore anime, browse genres, open detailed views, and discover related titles.

projects.name: EasyToDo
projects.summary: A local-first TypeScript app focused on fast state handling, clean product logic, and a deliberately minimal workflow for managing tasks and habits.

image.alt: EasyToDo task and habit tracker interface

externalProjects.name: Team Logistics
externalProjects.description: Global logistics operator based in the Dominican Republic, specialized in freight forwarding for importers and distributors.

externalProjects.name: Oxsis
externalProjects.description: Logistics and customs brokerage company based in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic, operating from Las Américas International Airport (AILA).
